questionHtml: Show that the phase difference between the oscillations of the two corks is π radians.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1
Phase difference is 2πλ × λ2 ✓
«= π» ✓ 

ALTERNATIVE 2

One wavelength/period represents «phase difference» of 2π and «corks» are ½ wavelength/period apart so phase difference is π/OWTTE ✓

meta.title: Show that the phase difference between the oscillations of the two corks is π radians.
